trans-unit.source: All
trans-unit.target: All

trans-unit.source: Argument cannot be null or empty
trans-unit.target: Argument cannot be null or empty

trans-unit.source: This Command/Parameter combination has been deprecated and will be removed in the next release. Please consider using the new command that replaces it: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: This Command/Parameter combination has been deprecated and will be removed in the next release. Please consider using the new command that replaces it: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Would you like to continue with the project action(s) anyways?
trans-unit.target: Would you like to continue with the project action(s) anyways?

trans-unit.source: Do not continue with the project action(s)
trans-unit.target: Do not continue with the project action(s)

trans-unit.source: Continue with the project action(s) and do not prompt for confirmation again
trans-unit.target: Continue with the project action(s) and do not prompt for confirmation again

trans-unit.source: Continue with the project action(s)
trans-unit.target: Continue with the project action(s)

trans-unit.source: Stop to display more packages
trans-unit.target: Stop to display more packages

trans-unit.source: Continue to display more packages
trans-unit.target: Continue to display more packages

trans-unit.source: Executing script file '{0}'
trans-unit.target: Executing script file '{0}'

trans-unit.source: Failed to parse package identities from file {0} with exception: {1}
trans-unit.target: Failed to parse package identities from file {0} with exception: {1}

trans-unit.source: Failed to parse the input of Version parameter: {0} to a valid Semantic version.
trans-unit.target: Failed to parse the input of Version parameter: {0} to a valid Semantic version.

trans-unit.source: The following source failed to search for packages: '{0}'{1}{2}
trans-unit.target: The following source failed to search for packages: '{0}'{1}{2}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the source that failed. {1} is a line separator. {2} is the exception message.

trans-unit.source: Skip this file and all subsequent files
trans-unit.target: Skip this file and all subsequent files

trans-unit.source: Skip this file
trans-unit.target: Skip this file

trans-unit.source: File Conflict
trans-unit.target: File Conflict

trans-unit.source: Overwrite this file and all subsequent files
trans-unit.target: Overwrite this file and all subsequent files

trans-unit.source: Overwrite this file
trans-unit.target: Overwrite this file

trans-unit.source: No packages found in the current package source.
trans-unit.target: No packages found in the current package source.

trans-unit.source: The PSDrive '{0}' was not found.
trans-unit.target: The PSDrive '{0}' was not found.

trans-unit.source: The path '{0}' is invalid.
trans-unit.target: The path '{0}' is invalid.

trans-unit.source: Only paths residing on a FileSystemProvider are supported.
trans-unit.target: Only paths residing on a FileSystemProvider are supported.

trans-unit.source: Some NuGet packages are missing from the solution. The packages need to be restored in order to build the dependency graph. Restore the packages before performing any operations.
trans-unit.target: Some NuGet packages are missing from the solution. The packages need to be restored in order to build the dependency graph. Restore the packages before performing any operations.

trans-unit.source: &No
trans-unit.target: &No

trans-unit.source: No to Al&l
trans-unit.target: No to Al&l

trans-unit.source: No compatible project(s) found in the active solution.
trans-unit.target: No compatible project(s) found in the active solution.

trans-unit.source: No package actions available to be executed.
trans-unit.target: No package actions available to be executed.

trans-unit.source: No package updates are available from the current package source for project '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: No package updates are available from the current package source for project '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: No packages installed.
trans-unit.target: No packages installed.

trans-unit.source: There are no other projects to sync the package '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: There are no other projects to sync the package '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The current environment doesn't have a solution open.
trans-unit.target: The current environment doesn't have a solution open.

trans-unit.source: Package with the Id '{0}' is not installed to project '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Package with the Id '{0}' is not installed to project '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' was not installed in any project. Update failed.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' was not installed in any project. Update failed.

trans-unit.source: Project '{0}' is not found.
trans-unit.target: Project '{0}' is not found.

trans-unit.source: There may be more packages to display. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.target: There may be more packages to display. Do you want to continue?

trans-unit.source: One or more packages could not be completely uninstalled: '{0}'. Restart Visual Studio to finish uninstall.
trans-unit.target: One or more packages could not be completely uninstalled: '{0}'. Restart Visual Studio to finish uninstall.

trans-unit.source: Time Elapsed: {0}
trans-unit.target: Time Elapsed: {0}

trans-unit.source: &Yes
trans-unit.target: &Yes

trans-unit.source: Yes to &All
trans-unit.target: Yes to &All

trans-unit.source: Yes and &Ignore future warnings
trans-unit.target: Yes and &Ignore future warnings

trans-unit.source: Each package is licensed to you by its owner. NuGet is not responsible for, nor does it grant any licenses to, third-party packages. Some packages may include dependencies which are governed by additional licenses. Follow the package source (feed) URL to determine any dependencies.
trans-unit.target: Each package is licensed to you by its owner. NuGet is not responsible for, nor does it grant any licenses to, third-party packages. Some packages may include dependencies which are governed by additional licenses. Follow the package source (feed) URL to determine any dependencies.

trans-unit.source: Type 'get-help NuGet' to see all available NuGet commands.
trans-unit.target: Type 'get-help NuGet' to see all available NuGet commands.

trans-unit.source: Nested prompt not supported.
trans-unit.target: Nested prompt not supported.

trans-unit.source: Unable to find package '{0}' at source '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Unable to find package '{0}' at source '{1}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} - package id {1} - source string specified by the user

trans-unit.source: Error: The Package Manager Console requires PowerShell 2.0 runtime, which is not detected on this machine. Please install the PowerShell 2.0 from http://support.microsoft.com/kb/968929 and restart Visual Studio.
trans-unit.target: Error: The Package Manager Console requires PowerShell 2.0 runtime, which is not detected on this machine. Please install the PowerShell 2.0 from http://support.microsoft.com/kb/968929 and restart Visual Studio.

trans-unit.source: Package Manager Console Host Version {0}
trans-unit.target: Package Manager Console Host Version {0}

trans-unit.source: [?] Help (default is "{0}"):
trans-unit.target: [?] Help (default is "{0}"):

trans-unit.source: Source '{0}' not found. Please provide an HTTP or local source.
trans-unit.target: Source '{0}' not found. Please provide an HTTP or local source.

trans-unit.source: Unsupported type of source '{0}'. Please provide an HTTP or local source.
trans-unit.target: Unsupported type of source '{0}'. Please provide an HTTP or local source.

trans-unit.source: Unable to find package '{0}' at source '{1}'. Source not found.
trans-unit.target: Unable to find package '{0}' at source '{1}'. Source not found.
trans-unit.note: Used to fix the accuracy of the error message {0} is package id {1} is source path

trans-unit.source: The `-Reinstall` parameter does not apply to PackageReference based projects `{0}'.
trans-unit.target: The `-Reinstall` parameter does not apply to PackageReference based projects `{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The '{0}' parameter is not respected for the transitive package management based project(s) {1}. The enabled sources in your NuGet configuration will be used.
trans-unit.target: The '{0}' parameter is not respected for the transitive package management based project(s) {1}. The enabled sources in your NuGet configuration will be used.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the parameter, {1} are the project names

trans-unit.source: Zero length collection.
trans-unit.target: Zero length collection.
